prompt: Studio product shot of a premium enamel camp mug on a neutral warm gray seamless background with a soft natural shadow beneath it, catalog quality, sharp focus. The mug is warm paper white (#fffdf7) with a thin AITX orange #ff4201 rim. On the front, the orange AITX open-arms mark is printed cleanly, and beneath it in confident black serif-free type reads exactly: 'come build the future with us'. Wrapping the lower side in small type is the lockup 'AITX x NVIDIA', AITX in orange #ff4201 and the NVIDIA wordmark in NVIDIA green #76b900. Realistic enamel texture, subtle reflections, professional lighting, minimal and premium.
